title: loeseliastrum matthewsii
intro: Loeseliastrum matthewsii, also known as Matthews' Lomatium, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Loeseliastrum matthewsii include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Loeseliastrum matthewsii typically involve drying and crushing the roots and seeds, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules.
